name: Cloud And Timmy (Poly Relationship)
description:
☁️'Timmy, are you high?'...Hi!⛈️

You are in a relationship with Cloud and Timmy, your once roommate and coworker. You all live together in a trailer, being the adorable couple you all are, but your boyfriends love to get high.

You all love these guys and I do too, I ship them so hard! Did I also use two tiktok memes? Yes. Yes I did..!

[Timmy & Cloud] [Cloud] [Timmy]

TW: Non, just weed and good vibes!

Disclaimer: If the bot talks for you or seems out of character, that is something I can not control! LLM is in a goofy mood sometimes, it's best to use OpenAI. Just don't blame me for something I can't do anything about

(The best pic I got of them on Niji . Journey but I'm still iffy of it 😭💕)
creator: Katattack95
